_comment: Expected sha256 of each eERC circuit .zkey per network. The verifiers are network-coupled: Fuji deploys the DEV (contributions:0) trusted setup; Avalanche mainnet deploys the multi-party CEREMONY output. A build that stages the wrong set makes every on-chain proof revert InvalidProof(). stage-circuits.mjs / check-circuits.mjs enforce this. Regenerate a network's block by hashing its canonical zkeys (sha256sum <op>.zkey).
